exam_name: CPIM Part 2 — Strategic Management of Resources

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Pearson VUE test centers and online proctored delivery

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID with full name. Name must match ASCM registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or study materials permitted. On-screen calculator provided. 3-year access to official study materials included with exam registration. 30-day waiting period required before retaking.
renewal_options: Earn 75 PDCs (Professional Development Credits) every 5 years. PDCs earned through education, professional activities, and volunteering. Submit PDCs via the ASCM certification portal.

prerequisites.description: CPIM Part 1 (Basics of Supply Chain Management) must be passed first

retake_policy.notes: Must wait 30 days before retaking. Full exam fee required for each retake attempt.

official_study_resources.title: ASCM Official Exam Study Materials
official_study_resources.notes: Official learning system with 3-year access included with exam registration fee

official_study_resources.title: ASCM Practice Questions
official_study_resources.notes: Official practice questions available through the ASCM learning portal

aliases: cpim part 2 strategic management of resources
